description:
Replace full-list rendering with react-window or react-virtuoso for any view rendering 100+ rows (task lists, logs, reports). Render only visible viewport items.

**Rationale:** Large DOM trees cause jank on scroll and input. Virtualization keeps node count constant regardless of dataset size, maintaining 60 FPS.
title: Virtualized list and table rendering
